power.method: PoE; 11W device, 22W with optional Vision Enhancer

features: color-only variant of the AI Pro -- identical specs, white housing
3x optical zoom (not 4x -- prior figure was wrong)
optional Vision Enhancer accessory extends IR range from 25m up to 40m
sensor/lens corrected from prior stored values (1/1.2" CMOS, 2.8-12mm F1.4) which did not match the official spec sheet

home_assistant.notes: Native UniFi Protect integration. Requires UniFi Protect console.
